channel.title: Combined Politepol Feed
channel.description: Merged feed from multiple Politepol sources

item.title: Kristi Noem fired as Homeland Security chief: What controversies defined her tenure?
How India responded to Iran’s SOS call after US torpedoed warship Iris Dena
FirstUp: Vote counting in Nepal, Canada's Carney to visit Japan... The news today
UK, France, Greece and more: How European countries are offering military aid to Gulf, Cyprus amid Iran war
Who is Xueqin Jiang, Chinese professor predicting US defeat in war against Iran?
Iran war: Is Tehran winning the drone battle against Washington and Tel Aviv?
Sinking of Iranian frigate off Sri Lankan waters an act of stunning recklessness by the Trump administration
item.description: The sinking of IRIS Dena in international waters is the first acknowledged instance of an American submarine sinking an enemy surface vessel since World War II, and the first torpedo-based sinking of any warship since the 1982 Falklands War

item.title: Nepal polls: Can Balen Shah vanquish the old guard?
item.description: Balen Shah, a rapper-turned-Kathmandu mayor, has become a symbol of disruption

item.title: Bangladesh at a crossroads: Why BNP must avoid Yunus’s mistakes
item.description: The question before the BNP government is whether it will once again choose the path of indemnity and exclusion, or whether it will break from that legacy and allow the Constitution to prevail

item.title: West Asian crisis: Energy markets face a Hormuz test
item.description: What began as geopolitical tension in the Gulf has quickly become a physical shock to energy markets

item.title: Iran and the Indian art of strategic silence
item.description: India sees that the Iranian regime is unpopular, and murderous, at home, and its strategic offerings are limited. In a difficult world, it acts accordingly

item.title: US Sutra | The Iran paradox: The strange case of Left-liberal mourning for Tehran
item.description: To eulogise and lament the demise of a barbarous despot and a brutal regime, which trampled on its own citizens and destroyed its own country economically, socially and politically, is sheer folly
